title: ephippianthus sachalinensis
intro: Ephippianthus sachalinensis, also known as Korean angelica, is a type of flowering plant in the parsley family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of coumarins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ephippianthus sachalinensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches and menstrual cramps, and support the immune system. It is often prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and can also be used in infusions and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
